source_pr.title: planner: fix prepare plan cache doesn't work for expression index.
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: wjhuang2016 <huangwenjun1997@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #26697 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:
We use constItem to check the expression. But it will reject the cache constant. 

### What is changed and how it works?

Remove the constraint `constItem`, I don't think we need it.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: c.Check(tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a", false), IsFalse) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: c.Check(tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a", false), IsFalse) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: c.Check(tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a", false), IsFalse) (planner/core/integration_test.go).
fix_pattern: c.Check(tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a", false), IsFalse) (planner/core/integration_test.go)

evidence: evidence: c.Check(tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a", false), IsFalse) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
